HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROBERT ROTNER'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. ROBERT ROTNER HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: LETICIA PEREZ, CSR #7782(206)
